---
title: "Simon Christensen"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: IMG_2722.JPG
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/scsimonsez
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/simon-christensen-204796337/?enhance=null
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---
Welcome to my Website! A little bit about me and my life

## Education

Cal State University, Fullerton \|Fullerton, California \| August 2023 - May 2026

## Experience

In-N-Out Burger \| Associate - Level 6 (cook) \| Jan 2023 - present
